title: Crown Royal Barbershop Renovation in Manhattan
seoTitle: Commercial Barbershop Renovation in Manhattan, NY | Repair Asap LLC
description: Repair Asap completed a commercial barbershop build-out for Crown Royal Barbershop on 3rd Ave in Manhattan, including drywall repair, restroom build-out, ceiling leak repair, porcelain floor tile, subway tile, painting, lighting, and a custom wood slat partition.
excerpt: A damaged Manhattan commercial space was turned into a finished barbershop with new drywall, restroom tile, porcelain flooring, subway tile, lighting, painting, and a custom wood slat feature wall.
scope: Commercial drywall repair and wall leveling
Ceiling repair after upstairs water leak
Subway tile installation in the main room
Drywall partition with vertical wood slat panels and integrated accent lighting
challenge: The barbershop space had old damaged drywall from previous tenants, an unfinished restroom with only rough plumbing, missing ceiling sections, leak-damaged ceiling areas, and uneven walls throughout the customer-facing room.
solution: Repair Asap rebuilt the restroom walls and ceiling, repaired and leveled drywall across the main space, installed durable porcelain floor tile and subway wall tile, restored leak-damaged ceiling sections with an access panel, painted the interior, installed lighting, and built a custom wood slat partition with integrated accent lighting.
result: The project delivered a clean, durable, customer-ready barbershop interior with a finished restroom, tile floors and walls, repaired ceilings, professional lighting, and a warm custom feature wall.
